mechanism_narrative: A sustained low unemployment rate signals a tight labor market, which can lead to wage inflation and reduced corporate profit margins, negatively impacting S&P 500 forward returns as economic growth potentially slows or reverses.
evidence_refs: fact:Historically low unemployment often precedes economic slowdowns.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 60% of periods when UNRATE is below 4.0% for three consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate rises above a critical threshold, it indicates a restrictive monetary policy stance designed to cool an overheating economy, which typically leads to a contraction in equity valuations and negative S&P 500 forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:Central banks raise rates to combat inflation or cool growth.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of periods following FEDFUNDS crossing above 3.0% and remaining there for at least one month.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous and sustained decline in both retail sales and housing starts indicates a broad-based weakening of consumer demand and investment, signaling an impending economic contraction that negatively impacts S&P 500 forward returns.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month annualized change < -3% AND HOUST 3-month annualized change < -5%
evidence_refs: fact:Consumer spending and housing are key drivers of economic growth.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are positive when both RSAFS and HOUST show a significant simultaneous decline as specified in the trigger condition.

mechanism_narrative: During an early-cycle expansion, robust growth in industrial production indicates increasing manufacturing activity and business confidence, which translates into higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:Industrial production is a coincident indicator of economic activity.
failure_condition: In identified early-cycle expansion regimes, SPX 5-day forward returns are negative or flat following strong INDPRO growth for two consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in real GDP reflects a healthy and expanding economy, which generally supports corporate revenue and profit growth, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over a longer horizon as investor confidence builds.
evidence_refs: fact:GDP growth is the broadest measure of economic health.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of periods when GDPC1 shows positive annualized growth for two consecutive quarters.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer price inflation exceeds a certain threshold, it signals an overheating economy and potential for aggressive monetary tightening, which erodes corporate margins and investor confidence, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:High inflation often prompts central bank intervention.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 60% of periods when CPIAUCSL 12-month change is above 3.0% for two consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of robust payroll employment growth and a low unemployment rate indicates a strong and stable labor market, supporting consumer spending and corporate profits, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns in the short term.
evidence_refs: fact:Strong employment typically boosts consumer confidence and spending.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns are negative when PAYEMS shows strong growth and UNRATE is low, as specified in the trigger condition.

mechanism_narrative: A significant increase in housing starts above a historical average indicates a robust housing market, reflecting strong consumer confidence and investment, which typically precedes broader economic growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:Housing starts are a leading indicator of economic activity.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of periods when HOUST 3-month average exceeds 1500k units for two consecutive months.
